name: Maria Santos
title: HR Manager
quote: Nakatipid kami ng halos 3 araw kada buwan sa payroll processing. Yung SSS at BIR compliance na dati akong nag-aalala, awtomatiko na ngayon. Sobrang ganda ng sistema!
quoteEn: We saved almost 3 days per month on payroll processing. The SSS and BIR compliance I used to worry about is now automatic. The system is amazing!

name: Jose Reyes
title: CFO
quote: The multi-company feature is a game-changer for us. We manage 12 retail entities from one dashboard. Real-time consolidated reports that used to take a week now take minutes.
quoteEn: The multi-company feature is a game-changer for us. We manage 12 retail entities from one dashboard. Real-time consolidated reports that used to take a week now take minutes.

name: Ana Cruz
title: People Operations Lead
quote: As a tech company, we needed a modern HRIS that could keep up. The API integrations and mobile app for employees are exactly what we needed. Our team loves it.
quoteEn: As a tech company, we needed a modern HRIS that could keep up. The API integrations and mobile app for employees are exactly what we needed. Our team loves it.

name: Roberto Mendoza
title: HR Director
location: Mall of Asia Complex, Pasay City
quote: Hindi ko akalaing makakahanap ng Philippine HRIS na kaya ng enterprise-level requirements namin. The data privacy compliance (RA 10173) features alone justified the switch.
quoteEn: I didn't think we'd find a Philippine HRIS that could handle our enterprise-level requirements. The data privacy compliance (RA 10173) features alone justified the switch.

name: Liza Reyes
title: Finance & Admin Manager
quote: The 13th month pay calculation used to be a nightmare across all our branches. Now it's done in one click. BIR Form 2316 generation is seamless too.
quoteEn: The 13th month pay calculation used to be a nightmare across all our branches. Now it's done in one click. BIR Form 2316 generation is seamless too.

name: Mark Villanueva
title: Operations Manager
quote: The attendance tracking with biometric integration works perfectly with our existing hardware. Night differential and overtime calculations are spot-on per Labor Code.
quoteEn: The attendance tracking with biometric integration works perfectly with our existing hardware. Night differential and overtime calculations are spot-on per Labor Code.

name: Christine Dela Rosa
title: CHRO
quote: Security and audit trails were non-negotiable for us as a bank. This system delivers enterprise-grade security with complete visibility into every transaction and data access.
quoteEn: Security and audit trails were non-negotiable for us as a bank. This system delivers enterprise-grade security with complete visibility into every transaction and data access.

name: Patrick Bautista
title: HR Business Partner
quote: Switching from our old system was seamless. The data migration team handled everything. We were live in 3 weeks and processing payroll accurately from day one.
quoteEn: Switching from our old system was seamless. The data migration team handled everything. We were live in 3 weeks and processing payroll accurately from day one.
metric: Live in 3 weeks, zero data loss
